name: zeze-canned
description: Sistem genelinde çalışan metin genişletici masaüstü uygulaması

scripts.build: node scripts/ensure-app-icon.js && node scripts/ensure-default-profile.js && node scripts/ensure-snippets-file.js && npx @electron/rebuild -f -w uiohook-napi && npx @electron/packager . ZezeCanned --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --icon=build/icon.ico --out=dist --overwrite --asar --extra-resource=snippets.json --extra-resource=build/default-profile.jpg --extra-resource=scripts/raw-keyboard-helper.ps1
scripts.dist:exe: npm run build && npm run setup:squirrel && node scripts/copy-setup-to-root.js
